title: Component Architecture
subtitle: Inputs, outputs, signals, change detection, and dynamic components
description: Go beyond basic components to master Angular's component communication patterns, change detection strategies, Angular 17+ signals, and dynamic component loading. These topics dominate mid-to-senior Angular interviews.
learningOutcomes: Use @Input/@Output and signal-based inputs for component communication
Query the DOM and child components with @ViewChild and @ContentChild
Implement multi-slot content projection with ng-content
Explain how Zone.js and change detection work together
Apply OnPush strategy correctly and understand when it breaks
Use signals, computed, and effect for reactive state management
Dynamically create and attach components with ViewContainerRef
